role: Generated cross-language client boundary for Discovery producer contracts

integrations.notes: All three generated clients implement exact Data Engine discovery-release commit and get operations. Canonical source locks bind merged Data Engine main head 67e1c88d21961586d5efc39d5db50e0f2cd34906.

Producer-derived route metadata selects the tempera-bio human bearer or tempera-workflows service bearer for signer, approval, and provider-resolution operations. Canonical provenance binds merged Auth Hub main head 7167ecad3a75f787925ebce0838407fe7d3bde3a.

The canonical source lock and generated methods bind merged Gym main head f96317c2a4083780d00d03622181de5cf20fc79e for task, trainer, episode, and sealed-evaluation contracts; no external sealed result is claimed.

limitations: Generated Discovery methods prove cross-language dispatch and contract conformance, not a hosted production call.
Canonical source locks prove exact contract provenance and generated-client parity; they do not prove that any hosted producer deployment has adopted those commits.
Authorization clients transport approvals and external secret references; they do not approve, resolve a secret, submit physical work, or prove provider execution without an authorized caller.
The SDK transports evidence contracts; it does not determine biological validity, experimental execution, production qualification, or dataset eligibility.
